/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsubsea_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so -o libsubsea_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so CMakeFiles/subsea_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp/subsea_interfaces/srv/detail/dds_fastrtps/capture_pair__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/jazzy/lib:/home/subseascanning/trajectory-calculation-3d-scanner/build/subsea_interfaces: /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so libsubsea_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.5 /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_dynamic_typesupport.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
